caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses speaks against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green tunic with small floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. In the first frame, her mouth is open as she speaks. In the second frame, she continues talking with a slightly different mouth position. By the third frame, she maintains a similar speaking expression, and in the final frame, she begins to smile while still speaking. The "NPTEL" logo is visible in the bottom left corner of the first and third frames, and in the bottom center of the second and fourth frames. No other objects or people are present, and the setting remains static throughout the sequence.
